targets.query:
from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "humidity")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "ph")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "ec")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp" or r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ph" or r._field == "ec")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "led_a1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "LED A1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "led_a2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "LED A2")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "led_b1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "LED B1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "pump_a1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "PUMP C1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "pump_a2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "PUMP C2")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "pump_b1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "PUMP D1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "pump_b2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "PUMP D2")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "fan_a1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "FAN A1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "fan_b1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "FAN B1")

from(bucket: "CronusFarm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tele" and r._field == "fan_b2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "FAN B2")
